title: Midnight-Craving Croatian Pecorino-Romano Croquettes
description: Umami, chewy, and addictive, these croquettes combine the salty goodness of Pecorino-Romano cheese with the crunch of katsuramuki-cut vegetables and the subtlety of sesame seeds.
instructions: Grate the Pecorino-Romano cheese and set aside.
Cut the carrots, zucchini, and bell peppers into katsuramuki strips and set aside.
In a large mixing bowl, combine the grated cheese, katsuramuki-cut vegetables, breadcrumbs, egg, sesame seeds, salt, and black pepper.
Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Using a spoon, drop small portions of the cheese-vegetable mixture into the hot oil and flatten slightly.
Fry the croquettes until golden brown and crispy, about 3-4 minutes per side.
Remove the croquettes from the oil and place on a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
Serve the Midnight-Craving Croatian Pecorino-Romano Croquettes hot and enjoy!
Repeat the frying process in batches until all the croquettes are cooked.
Let the croquettes cool for a few minutes before serving.
